quality.rationale: 需逐步计算Christoffel联络与黎曼张量分量，逻辑链条完整，属标准弯曲空间微分几何训练题

origin.question:
Problem 9.4. Compute all the nonvanishing components of the Riemann tensor $\mathbf{R}_{\mathrm{ijk1}}(\mathrm{i},\mathrm{j},\mathrm{k},\mathrm{l} = 	heta ,\phi)$ for the 2-sphere metric
$$
\mathrm {d s}^{2} = \mathrm {r}^{2} (\mathrm {d} 	heta^{2} + \sin^{2} 	heta \mathrm {d} \phi^{2}).
$$
origin.solution:
Solution 9.4. According to the discussion in Problem 9.2, there is only one independent component. We can choose it to be
$$
\mathsf {R}_{	heta \phi 	heta \phi} = \mathsf {g}_{	heta 	heta} \mathsf {R}_{\phi 	heta \phi}^{	heta} = \mathsf {g}_{	heta 	heta} \left\{\Gamma_{\phi \phi , 	heta}^{	heta} - \Gamma_{	heta \phi , \phi}^{	heta} + \Gamma_{	heta a}^{	heta} \Gamma_{\phi \phi}^{a} - \Gamma_{\phi a}^{	heta} \Gamma_{\phi 	heta}^{a}ight\}.
$$
From the metric $\mathbf{g}_{	heta 	heta} = \mathbf{r}^2$ , $\mathbf{g}_{\phi \phi} = \mathbf{r}^2\sin^2	heta$ we find that the only nonvanishing Christoffel symbols are
$$
\Gamma_{\phi \phi}^{	heta} = - \sin 	heta \cos 	heta , \quad \Gamma_{	heta \phi}^{\phi} = \cot 	heta ,
$$
and, therefore,
$$
R_{	heta \phi 	heta \phi} = r^{2} \sin^{2} 	heta = R_{\phi 	heta \phi 	heta} = - R_{	heta \phi \phi 	heta} = - R_{\phi 	heta 	heta \phi}.
$$
